title: Add public demo tutorial Cursus
goal: Add a small public tutorial Cursus that teaches the KataForge practice loop through existing public example katas, without adding another homepage onboarding panel.
acceptance: A new public tutorial/demo Cursus appears on the homepage and `/cursus` alongside existing paths, using only committed public example content.
The tutorial has concise lessons that explain local-only practice, Run Samples vs Submit, results, drafts, UserKata import, and checkpoints/self-checks in the context of the app.
The path includes at least two existing public katas such as Two Sum and FizzBuzz and at least one lightweight self-check/checkpoint if the existing checkpoint system supports public examples.
All new lesson/checkpoint/cursus content validates through the content loaders and `pnpm exec kataforge check`.
Playwright smoke coverage verifies the tutorial Cursus appears, opens its first lesson route, and can navigate to a kata step.
Do not use private branding/content, external links as required steps, telemetry, auth, or a large new homepage quick-start/onboarding section.
must_ask_if: The tutorial requires new product positioning or copy that conflicts with the existing local-first KataForge language.
The checkpoint system cannot support a public self-check without broad schema/runtime changes.
